name: Leaf Spot
causes: Fungal or bacterial infections caused by high humidity, poor air circulation, and wet foliage.
symptoms: Small brown or black spots on leaves, yellowing, and damaged foliage.
description: A common plant disease that causes spots and damage on leaves.

name: Calcium Deficiency
causes: Low calcium availability in soil or poor nutrient absorption.
symptoms: Distorted young leaves, weak growth, and damaged leaf edges.
description: A nutrient problem that affects plant growth and cell development.

name: Scorched Leaves
causes: Excessive sunlight, high temperatures, dry air, or insufficient water.
symptoms: Brown crispy edges, burned appearance, and dried leaves.
description: Plant damage caused by heat, sunlight, or water stress.

name: Leaf Blight
causes: Fungal pathogens spreading in humid conditions.
symptoms: Large brown patches, wilting leaves, and rapid plant damage.
description: A serious plant disease that damages leaves and reduces plant health.

name: Yellow Vein Mosaic
causes: Virus infection commonly spread by insects such as whiteflies.
symptoms: Yellow patterns around leaf veins, weak growth, and leaf deformation.
description: A viral disease that causes yellow patterns and abnormal leaf growth.

name: Curly Yellow Virus
causes: Virus transmission by insects, especially whiteflies.
symptoms: Curled yellow leaves, stunted growth, and reduced production.
description: A viral infection causing yellowing and curling of plant leaves.
